title: Mellow Croatian Roast Sandwich
description: A comforting low-sodium Croatian roast sandwich with crusty bread, tender roasted pork, creamy mozzarella, and a briny aioli for a mellow flavor.
instructions: Brush the pork tenderloin with olive oil and season with fresh black pepper.
Place the pork in a baking dish and roast for 25 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 65 degrees celsius.
Let the pork rest for 5 minutes and then slice thinly.
Toast the sourdough slices until golden and slightly crisp.
Spread a generous amount of low-sodium aioli on one side of each slice.
Layer the sliced pork, mozzarella, caramelized shallots, and arugula on one slice of bread.
Top with the second slice of bread, aioli side down, and press gently.
Cut the sandwich in half, serve immediately, and enjoy the mellow flavors.
